# IOStreams

> IOStreams is a Ruby gem for streaming I/O that makes file formats, compression, encryption,
> and storage mechanisms (local file, S3, SFTP, HTTP) transparent to the application. Files of
> any size are processed one block at a time without loading them into memory.

The public entry points are `IOStreams.path(...)` and `IOStreams.stream(io)`, which are
configured via chained `#stream`/`#option` calls and consumed via `#reader`, `#writer`, `#each`,
`#read`, `#write`, `#copy_from`, etc.

## Docs

- [Overview](https://iostreams.rocketjob.io/): what IOStreams is, why it exists, and a quick comparison against hand-rolled streaming code.
- [Tutorial](https://iostreams.rocketjob.io/tutorial): step-by-step introduction to reading and writing files with IOStreams.
- [Path](https://iostreams.rocketjob.io/path): what a `Path` is, how it identifies where a file is stored (local disk, S3, SFTP, HTTP) and how to reach it.
- [Streams](https://iostreams.rocketjob.io/streams): the `#reader`/`#writer`/`#each`/`#read`/`#write` API used once you have a path.
- [File Extensions](https://iostreams.rocketjob.io/extensions): how file-name extensions (e.g. `.csv.gz.enc`) determine which streams are auto-applied.
- [File Formats](https://iostreams.rocketjob.io/formats): how rows (`:array`) and records (`:hash`) are converted to/from lines (CSV, PSV, JSON, fixed-width).
- [Copying Between Files](https://iostreams.rocketjob.io/copy_files): using `IOStreams.copy` to compress, decompress, encrypt, decrypt, and move files between storage locations.
- [PGP Encryption](https://iostreams.rocketjob.io/pgp): reading and writing PGP-encrypted files/streams by shelling out to GnuPG.
- [Configuring IOStreams](https://iostreams.rocketjob.io/config): setting up named roots via `IOStreams.add_root` so the same code can target different storage locations per environment.

## Optional

- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/reidmorrison/iostreams): source code, issue tracker, and CONTRIBUTING.md for the design philosophy behind the reader/writer pipeline.
- [CHANGELOG](https://github.com/reidmorrison/iostreams/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md): release history.
